libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Configure generated Gradle Test tasks with `jvmArgs '--add-opens=java.base/java.lang=ALL-UNNAMED'` when tests exercise `Ognl.compileExpression` or `ognl.enhance.ExpressionCompiler`; without it Javassist fails on JDK 17+ with `InaccessibleObjectException` for `ClassLoader#defineClass`. Do not set `ognl.security.manager` globally; if security-manager behavior is tested, set and restore that property inside individual tests and guard for JDKs where installing a `SecurityManager` is unsupported.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The resolved `ognl:ognl:3.3.5` artifact already declares `org.javassist:javassist:3.29.0-GA` as a compile dependency, so an explicit extra dependency should not be added unless local Gradle resolution proves otherwise.
Javassist dynamic class generation may remain unsupported in Native Image runtime tests even with JVM `--add-opens`; local Native Image verification is authoritative.
SecurityManager APIs are deprecated/disabled on newer JDKs, so tests that install a SecurityManager can be JDK-sensitive.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL is an in-memory Java expression library and needs no Docker image or extra Maven dependency, but meaningful coverage of its Javassist-backed expression compiler requires opening java.lang on modern JDKs.
